EmailTemplate.name: Ticket Creation Mention Notification
EmailTemplate.Description: Sent when a user is @mentioned in a Ticket Creation chatter comment. Gives the mentioned user a link to view the ticket in IdentityIQ.
EmailTemplate.Subject: You were mentioned on Ticket #$ticketId - $applicationName
EmailTemplate.Body:
⚡ IdentityIQ Ticket Creation
Mention Notification

Hi $mentionedUser,

You have been mentioned in a ticket chatter comment in IdentityIQ.

Ticket Details
#if ( $affectedAccess && $affectedAccess != "" ) #end
Ticket ID #$ticketId
Application $applicationName
Identity $identityName
Operation $operation
Status $status
Assigned To $assignedTo
Source $sourceType
Affected Access #foreach ( $entry in $affectedAccess.split(" ") ) #if ( $entry && $entry.trim() != "" ) #end #end
• $entry.trim()
Comment
$commentText
View Ticket in IdentityIQ
This is an automated notification from IdentityIQ Ticket Creation Plugin. If you believe you received this in error, contact your IIQ administrator.

Argument.name: ticketId
Argument.Description: The ticket ID.

Argument.name: applicationName
Argument.Description: The application name on the ticket.

Argument.name: identityName
Argument.Description: The identity name on the ticket.

Argument.name: operation
Argument.Description: The provisioning operation.

Argument.name: status
Argument.Description: The current ticket status.

Argument.name: assignedTo
Argument.Description: Who the ticket is assigned to.

Argument.name: errorMessage
Argument.Description: The error message on the ticket.

Argument.name: sourceType
Argument.Description: The source type (e.g. LCM).

Argument.name: requestId
Argument.Description: The identity request ID.

Argument.name: mentionedUser
Argument.Description: Display name of the mentioned user.

Argument.name: commentText
Argument.Description: The full comment text containing the mention.

Argument.name: pluginUrl
Argument.Description: Direct URL to the Ticket Creation plugin page.

Argument.name: affectedAccess
Argument.Description: Affected access entries from the error message.

EmailTemplate.name: Ticket Creation Assignment Notification
EmailTemplate.Description: Sent when a ticket is assigned to an identity in the Ticket Creation plugin.
EmailTemplate.Subject: Ticket #$ticketId has been assigned to you - $applicationName
EmailTemplate.Body:
⚡ IdentityIQ Ticket Creation
Assignment Notification

Hi $assignedUser,

A provisioning failure ticket has been assigned to you in IdentityIQ.

Ticket Details
#if ( $requestId && $requestId != "" ) #end
Ticket ID #$ticketId
Application $applicationName
Identity $identityName
Operation $operation
Status $status
Source $sourceType
Request ID $requestId
Error Summary
$errorMessage
View Ticket in IdentityIQ
This is an automated notification from IdentityIQ Ticket Creation Plugin. If you believe you received this in error, contact your IIQ administrator.

Argument.name: ticketId
Argument.Description: The ticket ID.

Argument.name: applicationName
Argument.Description: The application name on the ticket.

Argument.name: identityName
Argument.Description: The identity name on the ticket.

Argument.name: operation
Argument.Description: The provisioning operation.

Argument.name: status
Argument.Description: The current ticket status.

Argument.name: assignedTo
Argument.Description: Who the ticket is assigned to.

Argument.name: errorMessage
Argument.Description: The error message on the ticket.

Argument.name: sourceType
Argument.Description: The source type (e.g. LCM).

Argument.name: requestId
Argument.Description: The identity request ID.

Argument.name: assignedUser
Argument.Description: Display name of the assigned user.

Argument.name: pluginUrl
Argument.Description: Direct URL to the Ticket Creation plugin page.
